name: rewrite-missing-bearer
_note: NON-mutating 401 path. No Authorization header → guard throws UnauthorizedException('Missing bearer token') BEFORE any body parse or LLM call. Expected body {error:'Missing bearer token', code:'invalid-token', request_id} — error+code byte-compared, request_id ignored. This is one of only two byte-deterministic /v1/rewrite cases; the SUCCESS path is excluded from the gate (non-deterministic LLM output).
